summary:
Here are the top 5 strongest matches for a graduate/junior AI-ML engineer:

1. **Junior AI Engineer - Xelix**: This role fits as it's a junior position in AI engineering with a competitive salary range of £50,000 - £60,000. [https://careers.xelix.com/jobs/7852140-junior-ai-engineer](https://careers.xelix.com/jobs/7852140-junior-ai-engineer)
2. **Graduate Machine Learning Engineer Job in London**: This job matches as it involves working on production-grade machine learning and LLM-enabled products, suitable for a graduate with an MSc in AI & Robotics. [https://uk.indeed.com/q-graduate-machine-learning-engineer-l-london-jobs.html](https://uk.indeed.com/q-graduate-machine-learning-engineer-l-london-jobs.html)
3. **Junior AI Engineer - SDG Group**: This position fits as it's a junior role in an international company, offering integration into an AI & Data Science team from day one. [https://careers.sdggroup.com/jobs/7502548-junior-ai-engineer](https://careers.sdggroup.com/jobs/7502548-junior-ai-engineer)
4. **Remote Junior AI Engineer | Sandford Hill**: This job matches as it involves working on real-world projects, developing machine learning models, and performing data analysis, suitable for a junior AI engineer. [https://www.jobleads.com/gb/job/remote-junior-ai-engineer--sandford-hill--e1aab0b19ae23065d1349c68a929cfef5](https://www.jobleads.com/gb/job/remote-junior-ai-engineer--sandford-hill--e1aab0b19ae23065d1349c68a929cfef5)
5. **Data Science and AI Graduate Scheme**: This scheme fits as it offers a graduate role in data science and AI, providing an opportunity to work with a leading company in the field. [https://www.lloydsbankinggrouptalent.com/our-opportunities/graduates/data-science-and-ai-graduate-scheme/](https://www.lloydsbankinggrouptalent.com/our-opportunities/graduates/data-science-and-ai-graduate-scheme/)
